full_text:
Zhu (Gongdao) 祝 (公道)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu (祝), styledGongdao (公道), was born in Henan commandery. Rescued Jia Kui from prison of Guo Yuan, later executed for some crime. Zhu was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
